---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size70[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size50[
.center[
The Political Violence Case Study

(due Feb 20)
]]

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

### Prep for Class
1. Country sign-up page on Google sheets

2. Email the link to the class AFTER introducing the assignment

<br>

I am giving you our class meetings this week to work on your first assignment for the class.

A political violence case study.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-light_grey.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size50[**Political Violence Case Study**]

.size35[(due Feb 20)

Use all of the data sources from last week to write a report on **one country** that:

- **Summarizes AND analyzes** its recent history of political violence (e.g. over the last ten years), and 

- **Makes an argument** about what the current CIRIGHTS codings should be based on the 2020 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department
]

???

You will each prepare a report focused on the experience of political violence in a single country.

You will draw on the reports from the State Department, Amnesty International and the measurements from PTS and CIRIGHTS.

Your report should summarize and analyze the last ten years of history in that country, 

AND

Classify your country in 2020 using the CIRIGHTS variables.

### Questions on the assignment?

<br>

I'll send out a sheet where you can claim a country in just a moment.

No overlap, first-come first-served.



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-light_grey.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle

.size35[
Use all of the data sources from last week to write a report on **one country** that:

- **Summarizes AND analyzes** its recent history of political violence (e.g. over the last ten years), and 

- **Makes an argument** about what the current CIRIGHTS codings should be based on the 2020 Country Reports on Human Rights Practices from the State Department

**For Wednesday**: Come to class with 3-5 key conclusions about your country's experience of political violence based on your analyses
]

???

Today I want each of you to select your country, collect your data and start analyzing it.

Your goal should be to identify 3-5 key conclusions about your country's experience of political violence

For Wednesday: Be ready to present your key conclusions for feedback
